documentation.description:
These values define the type of firmware release. These values indicate
the first version or release of this type. For example the first alpha
release would be 64, the second would be 65.

record_types.name: Mav_Bool

documentation.description:
Enum used to indicate true or false (also: success or failure, enabled
or disabled, active or inactive).

record_types.name: Mav_Protocol_Capability

documentation.description:
Bitmask of (optional) autopilot capabilities (64 bit). If a bit is set,
the autopilot supports this capability.

subtypes.name: Firmware_Version_Type_Well_Known
subtypes.code:
subtype Firmware_Version_Type_Well_Known is Firmware_Version_Type
  with Static_Predicate => Firmware_Version_Type_Well_Known in
    Dev
    | Alpha
    | Beta
    | Rc
    | Official;
